title: @c15t/cli: c15t's CLI
description: CLI for c15t setup. Scaffold React and Next.js cookie banners, choose hosted/self-hosted/offline mode, and add consent integrations.
features: Cookie Banner Setup: Scaffold React and Next.js consent UI
Mode Selection: Choose hosted on inth.com, self-hosted backend, or offline mode
Script Integrations: Add Google Tag Manager, Google Consent Mode v2, Meta Pixel, and other consent-aware scripts
Configuration Generation: Automatically generate schema and code for consent management
Database Migrations: Simplified database schema updates
Multi-Framework Support: Works seamlessly across different web frameworks
Interactive CLI: User-friendly command-line interface with guided workflows
Agent Skills: Install reusable c15t agent skills for AI tooling
GitHub Integration: Easy way to star and support the project
Documentation Access: Quick access to project documentation
prerequisites: npm, pnpm, or yarn package manager
usage: Run `@c15t/cli setup` to create initial configuration
Use the docs bundled in installed c15t packages under `docs/` for local agent context
Customize consent settings in generated files
Use `@c15t/cli self-host migrate` for self-hosted database schema updates

commands.name: setup
commands.description: Set up c15t in your project

commands.name: codemods
commands.description: Run migration codemods for c15t upgrades

commands.name: skills
commands.description: Install c15t agent skills for AI-assisted development

commands.name: changelog
commands.description: Open the c15t changelog in your browser

commands.name: github
commands.description: Open the project's GitHub repository to star the project

commands.name: docs
commands.description: Open the c15t documentation in your browser

telemetry.description: Anonymous usage data collection to help improve the CLI
details: Used to prioritize features and improvements

customSections.Setup Paths:
- **Hosted on inth.com**: Configure a hosted c15t instance
- **Self-hosted backend**: Generate config and run database migrations for @c15t/backend
- **Offline mode**: Generate browser-only consent setup for demos, local development, previews, or static sites
